---
title: "DEGgo RNA-seq Report"
author: "DEGgo"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%Y-%m-%d')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 3
    number_sections: true
    theme: flatly
    self_contained: true
params:
  results: NULL
  sig_deg: NULL
  go_results: NULL
  summary: NULL
  metadata: NULL
  output_dir: NULL
---



```{r setup, include=FALSE}

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  results = "asis"
)

res <- params$results
outdir <- params$output_dir
md <- params$metadata %||% res$metadata

`%||%` <- function(x, y) if (is.null(x)) y else x

sig <- params$sig_deg %||% res$sig_deg
go  <- params$go_results %||% res$go_results
sumtab <- params$summary %||% res$summary

html_card <- function(title, value, subtitle = NULL) {
  cat(
    '<div class="metric-card">',
    '<div class="metric-title">', title, '</div>',
    '<div class="metric-value">', value, '</div>',
    if (!is.null(subtitle)) paste0('<div class="metric-subtitle">', subtitle, '</div>') else '',
    '</div>'
  )
}

show_table <- function(x, n = 30) {
  x <- as.data.frame(x)

  if (nrow(x) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No data available.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  if (is.finite(n)) x <- head(x, n)

  print(
    knitr::kable(
      x,
      format = "html",
      table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover table-condensed'"
    )
  )
}

find_png <- function(path) {
  if (length(path) == 0 || is.na(path)) return(character())
  if (!dir.exists(path)) return(character())

  list.files(
    path,
    pattern = "\\.png$",
    recursive = TRUE,
    full.names = TRUE
  )
}

clean_title <- function(x) {
  x <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(x))
  x <- gsub("_", " ", x)
  x <- gsub("Volcano Plot", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("GO terms", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("Heatmap", "", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  x <- gsub("PCA", "PCA", x, ignore.case = TRUE)
  trimws(x)
}

figure_badge <- function(f) {
  b <- basename(f)

  if (grepl("PCA", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("PCA")
  if (grepl("Volcano", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Volcano")
  if (grepl("Heatmap", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("Heatmap")
  if (grepl("GO", b, ignore.case = TRUE)) return("GO")

  "Figure"
}

emit_gallery <- function(files) {
  if (length(files) == 0) {
    cat("<p><em>No plot found.</em></p>")
    return(invisible(NULL))
  }

  files <- sort(files)

  cat('<div class="figure-grid">')

  for (f in files) {
    title <- clean_title(f)
    badge <- figure_badge(f)
    f <- normalizePath(f, winslash = "/", mustWork = TRUE)

    cat('<div class="figure-card">')

    cat('<div class="figure-header">')
    cat('<span class="figure-badge">', badge, '</span>')
    cat('<h3>', title, '</h3>')
    cat('</div>')

    cat('<a href="', f, '" target="_blank">')
    cat('<img src="', f, '" class="figure-img">')
    cat('</a>')

    cat('<div class="figure-footer">')
    cat('<a href="', f, '" target="_blank">Open full figure</a>')
    cat('</div>')

    cat('</div>')
  }

  cat('</div>')
}

clean_go <- function(x) {
  if (is.null(x)) return(data.frame())
  if (!is.null(x$go_results)) x <- x$go_results
  tryCatch(as.data.frame(x), error = function(e) data.frame())
}

find_first_dir <- function(paths) {
  paths <- paths[dir.exists(paths)]
  if (length(paths) == 0) return(NA_character_)
  paths[1]
}


# --------------------------------------------------------
# Metadata helpers
# --------------------------------------------------------

detect_sample_column <- function(md) {

  candidates <- c(
    "sample",
    "Sample",
    "sample_id",
    "SampleID",
    "id",
    "ID"
  )

  x <- intersect(candidates, colnames(md))

  if (length(x) > 0) {
    return(x[1])
  }

  colnames(md)[1]
}



detect_metadata_factors <- function(md, exclude = NULL) {

  cols <- setdiff(
    colnames(md),
    exclude
  )

  cols <- intersect(
    cols,
    colnames(md)
  )

  if (length(cols) == 0)
    return(character())


  keep <- vapply(
    md[, cols, drop = FALSE],
    function(x)
      is.character(x) ||
      is.factor(x) ||
      is.logical(x),
    logical(1)
  )


  cols[keep]

}



summarize_factor <- function(md, cols) {

  if (length(cols) == 0)
    return(data.frame())


  data.frame(
    factor = cols,

    levels = vapply(
      md[, cols, drop = FALSE],
      function(x)
        length(unique(x)),
      numeric(1)
    ),

    distribution = vapply(
      md[, cols, drop = FALSE],
      function(x)
        paste(
          paste(names(table(x)),
                as.vector(table(x)),
                sep="="),
          collapse=" | "
        ),
      character(1)
    ),

    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}


```


<style>
body {
  font-size: 14px;
  background: #fafafa;
}

h1, h2, h3 {
  font-weight: 700;
}

h1 {
  margin-top: 36px;
  border-bottom: 3px solid #00876C;
  padding-bottom: 8px;
}

h2 {
  margin-top: 28px;
}

.metric-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 14px;
  margin: 20px 0;
}

.metric-card {
  background: white;
  padding: 18px;
  border-radius: 16px;
  border: 1px solid #e6e6e6;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

.metric-title {
  color: #666;
  font-size: 13px;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

.metric-value {
  font-size: 25px;
  font-weight: 800;
  margin-top: 8px;
  color: #111;
}

.metric-subtitle {
  color: #777;
  margin-top: 6px;
  font-size: 12px;
}

.figure-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(360px, 1fr));
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 20px;
}

.figure-card {
  background: white;
  border: 1px solid #e6e6e6;
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 16px;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(0,0,0,0.07);
}

.figure-header {
  margin-bottom: 12px;
}

.figure-header h3 {
  font-size: 16px;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
  line-height: 1.25;
}

.figure-badge {
  display: inline-block;
  padding: 4px 11px;
  border-radius: 999px;
  background: #00876C;
  color: white;
  font-size: 12px;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.figure-img {
  width: 100%;
  max-height: 650px;
  object-fit: contain;
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #eee;
  background: white;
}

.figure-footer {
  margin-top: 10px;
  font-size: 13px;
}

.figure-footer a {
  color: #00876C;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.table {
  background: white;
  border-radius: 10px;
  overflow: hidden;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.04);
}

pre {
  background: #111;
  color: #eee;
  padding: 16px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  max-height: 500px;
  overflow-y: auto;
}

code {
  color: #00876C;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .figure-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }

  .metric-grid {
    grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr);
  }
}
</style>

## Overview

```{r}

cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

html_card("Analysis mode", res$run_params$analysis_mode %||% "NA")
html_card("Method", res$run_params$method %||% "NA")
html_card("Organism", res$run_params$organism %||% "NA")
html_card("DEGgo version", res$version %||% "development")

cat('</div>')

cat("<p><strong>Output directory:</strong><br>")
cat("<code>", outdir, "</code></p>")

```



# Sample metadata


```{r}

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")

metadata_file <- file.path(
  repro_dir,
  "clean_matched_metadata.tsv"
)

input_summary_file <- file.path(
  repro_dir,
  "clean_input_summary.tsv"
)


# --------------------------------------------------------
# Input summary
# --------------------------------------------------------

if (file.exists(input_summary_file)) {

  input_summary <- read.delim(
    input_summary_file,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

  cat("<h3>Input summary</h3>")

  if (all(c("metric","value") %in% colnames(input_summary))) {

    cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(input_summary))) {

      html_card(
        as.character(input_summary$metric[i]),
        as.character(input_summary$value[i])
      )

    }

    cat('</div>')

  } else {

    print(
      knitr::kable(
        input_summary,
        format = "html",
        table.attr =
          "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
      )
    )

  }

}



# --------------------------------------------------------
# Load metadata
# --------------------------------------------------------

md <- NULL

if (file.exists(metadata_file)) {

  md <- read.delim(
    metadata_file,
    check.names = FALSE,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

} else if (!is.null(res$metadata)) {

  md <- as.data.frame(
    res$metadata,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )

}



if (!is.null(md) && nrow(md) > 0) {


# --------------------------------------------------------
# Clean metadata columns
# --------------------------------------------------------

colnames(md) <- make.unique(
  trimws(colnames(md))
)

colnames(md)[colnames(md) == ""] <- paste0(
  "variable_",
  seq_len(sum(colnames(md) == ""))
)


# --------------------------------------------------------
# Detect sample column
# --------------------------------------------------------

sample_candidates <- c(
  "sample",
  "Sample",
  "sample_id",
  "SampleID",
  "id",
  "ID"
)


sample_col <- intersect(
  sample_candidates,
  colnames(md)
)


if (length(sample_col) == 0) {

  sample_col <- colnames(md)[1]

} else {

  sample_col <- sample_col[1]

}



# --------------------------------------------------------
# Metadata overview
# --------------------------------------------------------

cat("<h3>Metadata overview</h3>")

cat('<div class="metric-grid">')


html_card(
  "Samples",
  nrow(md)
)

html_card(
  "Variables",
  ncol(md)
)


html_card(
  "Categorical variables",
  sum(
    vapply(
      md,
      function(x)
        is.character(x) ||
        is.factor(x) ||
        is.logical(x),
      logical(1)
    )
  )
)


html_card(
  "Numeric variables",
  sum(
    vapply(
      md,
      is.numeric,
      logical(1)
    )
  )
)


cat('</div>')



# --------------------------------------------------------
# Design variables
# --------------------------------------------------------

cat("<h3>Study design overview</h3>")


design_cols <- setdiff(
  colnames(md),
  sample_col
)


if (length(design_cols) > 0) {


  design_data <- md[, design_cols, drop = FALSE]


  keep <- vapply(
    design_data,
    function(x)
      is.character(x) ||
      is.factor(x) ||
      is.logical(x),
    logical(1)
  )


  design_cols <- names(
    design_data
  )[keep]

}


if (length(design_cols) > 0) {


  design_table <- md[
    c(sample_col, design_cols),
    drop = FALSE
  ]


  print(
    knitr::kable(
      design_table,
      format="html",
      caption =
        "Sample overview and experimental design",
      table.attr =
        "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
    )
  )


} else {


  cat(
    "<p><em>No categorical design variables detected.</em></p>"
  )


}




# --------------------------------------------------------
# Experimental factors
# --------------------------------------------------------

if (length(design_cols) > 0) {


cat("<h3>Experimental factors</h3>")


factor_summary <- data.frame(

  factor = design_cols,

  levels = vapply(
    md[, design_cols, drop = FALSE],
    function(x)
      length(unique(x)),
    numeric(1)
  ),


  values = vapply(
    md[, design_cols, drop = FALSE],
    function(x)
      paste(unique(x), collapse=", "),
    character(1)
  ),

  stringsAsFactors = FALSE

)



print(
  knitr::kable(
    factor_summary,
    format="html",
    caption="Experimental design factors",
    table.attr =
      "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
  )
)


}




# --------------------------------------------------------
# Full metadata
# --------------------------------------------------------

cat("<details>")
cat(
"<summary><strong>Show complete metadata table</strong></summary>"
)


print(
  knitr::kable(
    md,
    format="html",
    table.attr =
      "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
  )
)


cat("</details>")


}


```


```{r}

# repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")
# 
# metadata_file <- file.path(
#   repro_dir,
#   "clean_matched_metadata.tsv"
# )
# 
# input_summary_file <- file.path(
#   repro_dir,
#   "clean_input_summary.tsv"
# )
# 
# # --------------------------------------------------------
# # Input summary
# # --------------------------------------------------------
# 
# if (file.exists(input_summary_file)) {
# 
#   input_summary <- read.delim(
#     input_summary_file,
#     check.names = FALSE
#   )
# 
#   cat("<h3>Input summary</h3>")
# 
#   if (
#     all(c("metric", "value") %in% colnames(input_summary))
#   ) {
# 
#     cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
# 
#     for (i in seq_len(nrow(input_summary))) {
# 
#       html_card(
#         as.character(input_summary$metric[i]),
#         as.character(input_summary$value[i])
#       )
# 
#     }
# 
#     cat('</div>')
# 
#   } else {
# 
#     print(
#       knitr::kable(
#         input_summary,
#         format = "html",
#         table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
#       )
#     )
# 
#   }
# 
#   cat("<br>")
# }
# 
# # --------------------------------------------------------
# # Metadata
# # --------------------------------------------------------
# 
# md <- NULL
# 
# if (file.exists(metadata_file)) {
# 
#   md <- read.delim(
#     metadata_file,
#     check.names = FALSE
#   )
# 
# } else if (!is.null(res$metadata)) {
# 
#   md <- as.data.frame(res$metadata)
# 
# }
# 
# if (!is.null(md) && nrow(md) > 0) {
# 
#   cat("<h3>Metadata summary</h3>")
# 
#   cat('<div class="metric-grid">')
# 
#   html_card(
#     "Samples",
#     nrow(md)
#   )
# 
#   html_card(
#     "Metadata variables",
#     ncol(md)
#   )
# 
#   html_card(
#     "Categorical variables",
#     sum(
#       vapply(
#         md,
#         function(x)
#           is.character(x) ||
#           is.factor(x) ||
#           is.logical(x),
#         logical(1)
#       )
#     )
#   )
# 
#   html_card(
#     "Numeric variables",
#     sum(
#       vapply(
#         md,
#         is.numeric,
#         logical(1)
#       )
#     )
#   )
# 
#   cat('</div>')
# 
#   cat("<br>")
# 
#   # ------------------------------------------------------
#   # Frequency tables for categorical variables
#   # ------------------------------------------------------
# 
#   summary_cols <- names(md)
# 
#   summary_cols <- summary_cols[
#     vapply(
#       md,
#       function(x)
#         is.character(x) ||
#         is.factor(x) ||
#         is.logical(x),
#       logical(1)
#     )
#   ]
# 
#   for (col in summary_cols) {
#     
#     tab <- tryCatch(
#       as.data.frame(
#         table(
#           md[[col]],
#           useNA = "ifany"
#         )
#       ),
#       error = function(e) NULL
#     )
#     
#     if (is.null(tab) || ncol(tab) != 2)
#       next
#     
#     colnames(tab) <- c(col, "n")
#     
#     
#     cat(
#       sprintf(
#         "<h3>%s</h3>",
#         tools::toTitleCase(
#           gsub("_", " ", col)
#         )
#       )
#     )
# 
#     print(
#       knitr::kable(
#         tab,
#         format = "html",
#         table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
#       )
#     )
# 
#     cat("<br>")
#   }
#   
#   cat("<details>")
#   cat("<summary><strong>Show full metadata table</strong></summary>")
#   
#   print(
#     knitr::kable(
#       md,
#       format = "html",
#       table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
#     )
#   )
#   
#   cat("</details>")
#   
# }

```



# Differential expression summary

```{r}

if (!is.null(res$summary)) {

  s <- as.data.frame(res$summary)

  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

  html_card(
    "Comparisons",
    nrow(s)
  )

  html_card(
    "Significant DEGs",
    format(sum(s$significant, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")
  )

  html_card(
    "Upregulated",
    format(sum(s$up, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")
  )

  html_card(
    "Downregulated",
    format(sum(s$down, na.rm = TRUE), big.mark = ",")
  )

  cat('</div>')

  cat("<br>")

  if (!is.null(res$summary)) {

  s <- as.data.frame(res$summary)

  plot_df <- rbind(
    data.frame(
      comparison = s$comparison,
      count = s$up,
      regulation = "Up"
    ),
    data.frame(
      comparison = s$comparison,
      count = s$down,
      regulation = "Down"
    )
  )

  p <- ggplot2::ggplot(
    plot_df,
    ggplot2::aes(
      x = stats::reorder(
        comparison,
        count,
        FUN = sum
      ),
      y = count,
      fill = regulation
    )
  ) +
    ggplot2::geom_col(width = 0.8) +
    ggplot2::coord_flip() +
    ggplot2::scale_fill_manual(
      values = c(
        Up = "#740001",
        Down = "#6497b1"
      )
    ) +
    ggplot2::labs(
      x = NULL,
      y = "Number of DEGs",
      fill = NULL
    ) +
    ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
    ggplot2::theme(
      legend.position = "top",
      panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)
    )

  print(p)
  }
  
  knitr::kable(
    s,
    format = "html",
    caption = "Pairwise differential expression summary",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
  )

} else {

  cat("<p><em>No DEG summary available.</em></p>")

}

```




## Quality control and PCA plots

```{r}

pca_dir <- find_first_dir(c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "PCA"),
  file.path(outdir, "pca")
))

pca_files <- find_png(pca_dir)
emit_gallery(pca_files)

```


## Differential expression volcano plots

```{r}

volcano_dir <- find_first_dir(c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_volcano"),
  file.path(outdir, "volcano"),
  file.path(outdir, "Volcano")
))

volcano_files <- find_png(volcano_dir)
emit_gallery(volcano_files)

```


## DEG heatmap

```{r}

heatmap_dir <- find_first_dir(c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_heatmaps"),
  file.path(outdir, "heatmaps"),
  file.path(outdir, "Heatmaps")
))

heatmap_files <- find_png(heatmap_dir)
emit_gallery(heatmap_files)

```



# Gene Ontology enrichment summary

```{r}

go_summary_file <- list.files(
  path = outdir,
  pattern = "^ALL_pairwise_GO_.*_merged\\.tsv$",
  recursive = TRUE,
  full.names = TRUE
)

if (length(go_summary_file) > 0) {

  go_merged <- utils::read.delim(
    go_summary_file[1],
    check.names = FALSE
  )

  ontology_value <- "BP"

  if ("ONTOLOGY" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {
    ontology_value <- unique(go_merged$ONTOLOGY)[1]
  }

  cat('<div class="metric-grid">')

  html_card(
    "GO comparisons",
    length(unique(go_merged$comparison))
  )

  html_card(
    "Unique GO terms",
    length(unique(go_merged$ID))
  )

  html_card(
    "Enriched rows",
    format(nrow(go_merged), big.mark = ",")
  )

  html_card(
    "Ontology",
    ontology_value
  )

  cat('</div>')

  cat("<br>")

  go_summary <- aggregate(
    ID ~ comparison,
    data = go_merged,
    FUN = length
  )

  colnames(go_summary) <- c(
    "comparison",
    "enriched_GO_terms"
  )

  if ("p.adjust" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {

    min_padj <- aggregate(
      p.adjust ~ comparison,
      data = go_merged,
      FUN = function(x) min(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

    colnames(min_padj) <- c(
      "comparison",
      "best_padj"
    )

    go_summary <- merge(
      go_summary,
      min_padj,
      by = "comparison",
      all.x = TRUE
    )
  }

  if ("Count" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {

    gene_count <- aggregate(
      Count ~ comparison,
      data = go_merged,
      FUN = function(x) sum(x, na.rm = TRUE)
    )

    colnames(gene_count) <- c(
      "comparison",
      "total_gene_hits"
    )

    go_summary <- merge(
      go_summary,
      gene_count,
      by = "comparison",
      all.x = TRUE
    )
  }

  go_summary <- go_summary[
    order(go_summary$enriched_GO_terms, decreasing = TRUE),
    ,
    drop = FALSE
  ]

  if (nrow(go_summary) > 0) {

    p_go <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      go_summary,
      ggplot2::aes(
        x = stats::reorder(
          comparison,
          enriched_GO_terms
        ),
        y = enriched_GO_terms
      )
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_col(
        width = 0.8,
        fill = "#00876C"
      ) +
      ggplot2::coord_flip() +
      ggplot2::labs(
        x = NULL,
        y = "Number of enriched GO terms"
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_bw(base_size = 12) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        panel.grid.major.y = ggplot2::element_blank(),
        axis.text.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 10)
      )

    print(p_go)
  }

  cat("<br>")

  knitr::kable(
    go_summary,
    format = "html",
    caption = "Summary of merged pairwise GO enrichment results",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
  )

  cat("<br>")

  keep_cols <- intersect(
    c(
      "comparison",
      "ID",
      "Description",
      "GeneRatio",
      "BgRatio",
      "p.adjust",
      "qvalue",
      "Count"
    ),
    colnames(go_merged)
  )

  if ("p.adjust" %in% colnames(go_merged)) {

    top_go <- go_merged[
      order(go_merged$p.adjust, decreasing = FALSE),
      keep_cols,
      drop = FALSE
    ]

  } else {

    top_go <- go_merged[, keep_cols, drop = FALSE]

  }

  cat("<h3>Top enriched GO terms across all comparisons</h3>")

  show_table(top_go, n = 50)

} else {

  cat("<p><em>No merged GO summary file found.</em></p>")

}

```




## Gene ontology plots

```{r}

go_dir <- find_first_dir(c(
  file.path(outdir, "pairwise_GO"),
  file.path(outdir, "GO"),
  file.path(outdir, "go")
))

go_files <- find_png(go_dir)
emit_gallery(go_files)

```


## Output files

```{r}

if (dir.exists(outdir)) {
  files <- list.files(outdir, recursive = TRUE, full.names = FALSE)
  files <- files[!grepl("\\.html$", files)]

  show_table(data.frame(file = files), n = 300)
}

```


# Reproducibility

```{r}

repro_dir <- file.path(outdir, "reproducibility")

param_file <- file.path(
  repro_dir,
  "run_parameters.tsv"
)

if (file.exists(param_file)) {

  run_params <- read.delim(
    param_file,
    check.names = FALSE
  )

  knitr::kable(
    run_params,
    format = "html",
    caption = "DEGgo analysis parameters",
    table.attr = "class='table table-striped table-hover'"
  )

} else {

  cat("<p><em>No reproducibility parameters available.</em></p>")

}

```


## Session information

```{r}

session_file <- file.path(outdir, "sessionInfo.txt")

cat("<pre>")

if (file.exists(session_file)) {
  cat(paste(readLines(session_file), collapse = "\n"))
} else {
  print(sessionInfo())
}

cat("</pre>")

```
